en: I don't know, I went somewhere, but I'm okay.
All right, it's a UK thing, all right, I got it, I got it.
But they wrote the bump in.
Yeah, when I first went to meet the director and I just found out I was pregnant,
ko: 네, 처음 감독을 만나러 갔을 때.

en: and I thought, I can't lie, it's going to become obvious.
And so I said I was pregnant and Susannah went, oh, okay.
So she said, I must talk to the producers.
And so this is my impression of Susannah. And it's lucky she's not here, because then I can tell you it's really good.
It is, it's absolutely spot on, yeah.
And then, and I was going, and if you remember Fargo, Frances McDormand was pregnant and it really added to it.
I think it would help, sort of fingers crossed. And they went away and came back and said,
yeah, okay, we can do pregnant, yeah. Yeah, we'll ride it in, so.
ko: 그들이 갔다가 돌아와서 네, 괜찮다고 했어요.

en: And it's good, because you didn't have to carry a bag in front of yourself or a baggy coat.
ko: 좋았어요, 앞에 가방을 들고 다닐 필요가 없었으니까요.

en: No, but I got so big, there would have been no hiding it.
And then, and also I was waddling quite a lot.
And Susannah once said, could you walk less pregnant?
